title: Evaluate Versioning Models
description: Contrast 'One Version' (Single Version Policy) and Independent Versioning models in a monorepo context. Evaluate the impact of different versioning models on dependency management and 'dependency hell'. Analyze the organizational cost of synchronized migrations compared to independent component updates.
objectives: Contrast 'One Version' (Single Version Policy) and Independent Versioning models in a monorepo context.
Evaluate the impact of different versioning models on dependency management and 'dependency hell'.
Analyze the organizational cost of synchronized migrations compared to independent component updates.
